channel.title: Refresh all other pages except the homepage to return 404
channel.description:
i create a frontity app: npx frontity create my-app
cd my-app
npx frontity dev
But refreshing the page on the article page will return 404

item.title: Refresh all other pages except the homepage to return 404
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
Hi @fanzhiyang2001

In order to provide the best possible help as quickly and as efficiently as possible, can you please provide the info suggested here?

The more info you provide about your issue the better.
Providing a repo or code-sandbox with your code is especially helpful to find solutions of technical issues with specific code

Read full topic
item.source: Refresh all other pages except the homepage to return 404

item.title: Refresh all other pages except the homepage to return 404
item.dc:creator: fanzhiyang2001
item.description:
i create a frontity app:
npx frontity create my-app

cd my-app

npx frontity dev

But refreshing the page on the article page will return 404
